texto: He watches the shadows cast by her hands as she sorts through their clothes scattered across the floor. The shape of her arms as she reaches up, slipping his black T-shirt over her head -- like victory. He considers the triumph of this moment, the slick of sweat on his chest. A small clatter, then the sound of a striking match. Her face glows. he reaches for her. She blows the match out, darts across the room, lights another one, glows, blows it out.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Suzanne Alyssa Andrew: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “He watches the shadows cast by her hands as she sorts through their clothes scattered across the …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, adventure, contemporary-fiction pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de contemporary-fiction e love-story.
